moments.title: Wimbledon 2026 Finals Week
moments.blurb: The second week of The Championships, Wimbledon, is underway, with quarter-finals, semi-finals, and finals taking place at the All England Club, culminating on July 12.

angles.name: Centre Court Drama
angles.copy: Who's making it to Centre Court for the big deciders? Wimbledon is serving up gripping drama all week long as the finals approach. #Wimbledon

angles.name: British Hopes
angles.copy: Can any British stars go all the way? The tension is building at Wimbledon as we head into the business end of the tournament.

moments.title: Formula 1 British Grand Prix
moments.blurb: The Formula 1 Pirelli British Grand Prix 2026 takes place this weekend, July 3-5, at the iconic Silverstone Circuit, featuring practice, sprint qualifying, sprint race, and the main Grand Prix.

angles.name: Silverstone Roar
angles.copy: Get ready for the roar! The British Grand Prix is at Silverstone this weekend. Who are you backing for pole position and the podium?

angles.name: Home Advantage
angles.copy: Home advantage for our British drivers? All eyes on Silverstone as the F1 British Grand Prix gets underway. It's set to be a rapid weekend!

moments.title: Tour de France Kicks Off
moments.blurb: The 113th edition of the Tour de France begins on July 4, 2026, in Barcelona, Spain, embarking on its three-week journey to Paris.

angles.name: Grand Départ
angles.copy: The greatest cycling race on Earth begins! The Tour de France starts this Saturday in Barcelona. Who's your pick for the yellow jersey?

angles.name: Mountain Challenges
angles.copy: From the streets of Barcelona to the brutal mountain climbs, the Tour de France is set to deliver three weeks of incredible sporting drama.

moments.title: Love Supreme Jazz Festival
moments.blurb: The Love Supreme Jazz Festival takes place from July 3-5, 2026, at Glynde Place in East Sussex, featuring a lineup of jazz, soul, and funk artists.

angles.name: Jazz & Soul Weekend
angles.copy: Sunshine and smooth grooves! Love Supreme Jazz Festival kicks off tomorrow in East Sussex. Who are you excited to see?

angles.name: Festival Vibes
angles.copy: East Sussex is about to get soulful! Love Supreme brings a weekend of incredible jazz, funk, and soul music. Get ready for the vibes!

moments.title: Kaleidoscope Festival at Alexandra Palace
moments.blurb: Kaleidoscope Festival returns to Alexandra Palace in London on July 11, 2026, offering a day of music, comedy, and arts.

angles.name: Ally Pally Calling
angles.copy: London, get ready! Kaleidoscope Festival is back at Alexandra Palace next weekend. Who's joining for a day of music and good times?

angles.name: Festival in the City
angles.copy: A full day of music, comedy, and more with panoramic views of London? Kaleidoscope Festival on July 11th sounds like the perfect Saturday!

moments.title: Happy 43rd Birthday, Michelle Branch
moments.blurb: American singer-songwriter Michelle Branch, known for hits like 'Everywhere' and 'Are You Happy Now?', turns 43 today.

angles.name: Pop-Rock Icon
angles.copy: Happy 43rd Birthday to the incredible Michelle Branch! Which of her early 2000s anthems is your all-time favourite?

angles.name: Everywhere She Goes
angles.copy: Celebrating Michelle Branch's 43rd birthday today! From 'Everywhere' to 'The Game of Love', her voice defined an era.

moments.title: Happy 34th Birthday, Burna Boy
moments.blurb: Nigerian superstar Burna Boy, a leading figure in Afrobeats and global music, celebrates his 34th birthday today.

angles.name: African Giant's Day
angles.copy: Happy 34th Birthday to the 'African Giant' himself, Burna Boy! What's your favourite track from the Afrobeats sensation?

angles.name: Global Beats
angles.copy: Celebrating Burna Boy's 34th today! His music has taken Afrobeats to the world stage. Raise a glass to the superstar!

moments.title: Happy 86th Birthday, Ringo Starr
moments.blurb: Legendary drummer and former Beatle, Ringo Starr, will celebrate his 86th birthday on July 7.

angles.name: Beatles Legend
angles.copy: Peace and love! The one and only Ringo Starr turns 86 on July 7th. What's your favourite Beatles track featuring his iconic drumming?

angles.name: Still Rockin'
angles.copy: Ahead of his 86th birthday on July 7th, we're celebrating the enduring legacy of Ringo Starr. A true rock & roll icon!

moments.title: Happy 62nd Birthday, Courtney Love
moments.blurb: Grunge icon and Hole frontwoman, Courtney Love, celebrates her 62nd birthday on July 9.

angles.name: Grunge Queen
angles.copy: Happy 62nd Birthday to the fearless Courtney Love! What's your favourite Hole anthem?

angles.name: Alternative Icon
angles.copy: Celebrating the enduring influence of Courtney Love on her 62nd birthday on July 9th. A true force in alternative rock.

moments.title: Happy 51st Birthday, Jack White
moments.blurb: Rock visionary Jack White, known for The White Stripes, The Raconteurs, and his solo work, turns 51 on July 9.

angles.name: Garage Rock Genius
angles.copy: Happy 51st Birthday to the incomparable Jack White! From 'Seven Nation Army' to his solo brilliance, what's your favourite White Stripes or Jack White moment?

angles.name: Modern Rock Hero
angles.copy: Celebrating Jack White's 51st birthday on July 9th! A true innovator who keeps rock and roll thrilling.

moments.title: Happy 72nd Birthday, Neil Tennant
moments.blurb: Neil Tennant, lead singer of iconic synth-pop duo Pet Shop Boys, will celebrate his 72nd birthday on July 10.

angles.name: Synth-Pop Icon
angles.copy: Happy 72nd Birthday to the legendary Neil Tennant of Pet Shop Boys on July 10th! What's your ultimate PSB track?

angles.name: West End Girls & Beyond
angles.copy: Celebrating Neil Tennant's 72nd birthday next week! From 'West End Girls' to their latest, Pet Shop Boys remain electronic music pioneers.

moments.title: Happy 87th Birthday, Mavis Staples
moments.blurb: Grammy Award-winning gospel and R&B singer Mavis Staples, known for her work with The Staple Singers and her solo career, turns 87 on July 10.

angles.name: Soul Legend
angles.copy: Happy 87th Birthday to the iconic Mavis Staples on July 10th! Her voice continues to inspire and uplift generations. What's your favourite Staple Singers song?

angles.name: Gospel Queen
angles.copy: Celebrating the incredible Mavis Staples' 87th birthday next week! A true living legend of soul and gospel music.

moments.title: The Open Championship Practice Days Begin
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship begins its practice days on Sunday, July 12, at Royal Birkdale Golf Club in Southport, England, ahead of the main tournament.

angles.name: Golf's Greatest Returns
angles.copy: The build-up begins! Practice days for The Open Championship start this Sunday at Royal Birkdale. Who are you hoping to see lift the Claret Jug?

angles.name: Royal Birkdale Ready
angles.copy: Royal Birkdale is getting ready to welcome the world's best golfers. The Open Championship practice days kick off this weekend!
